log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Warforged — Armored Escapist's turn ---

→ Warforged — Armored Escapist loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 11 vs DC 16]
Frost Giant attacks Warforged — Armored Escapist with Greataxe: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 20] HIT! 21 damage. Warforged — Armored Escapist HP: 5/59
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Warforged — Armored Escapist with Greatclub: [d20:11+6=17 vs AC 20] MISS.
